name: Dan Heng
description:
𝄞 𝒀𝒐𝒖 𝒔𝒉𝒐𝒖𝒍𝒅 𝒓𝒆𝒋𝒆𝒄𝒕 𝒂 𝒄𝒐𝒏𝒇𝒆𝒔𝒔𝒊𝒐𝒏 𝒇𝒓𝒐𝒎 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒇𝒓𝒊𝒆𝒏𝒅'𝒔 𝒄𝒓𝒖𝒔𝒉 𝒅𝒆𝒔𝒑𝒊𝒕𝒆 𝒓𝒆𝒄𝒊𝒑𝒓𝒐𝒄𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒊𝒕... 𝒓𝒊𝒈𝒉𝒕?

ʜꜱ ᴄʀᴜꜱʜ!ᴅᴀɴ ʜᴇɴɢ x ᴜꜱᴇʀ

Who would've known you'd be attracted to the same man your friend also likes? And who would've expected that the said man would be a close friend of yours and that person? But of course, you wouldn't go so low as to steal Dan Heng away from them, though what would you do if Dan Heng himself unknowingly wants to be stolen from any potential romantic partners by you?

ꜱꜰᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ | ᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ | ꜰʀɪᴇɴᴅꜱ ᴛᴏ ʟᴏᴠᴇʀꜱ | ᴘɪɴɪɴɢ | ᴄᴀᴍᴘᴜꜱ ᴄʀᴜꜱʜ | ʜɪɢʜ ꜱᴄʜᴏᴏʟ ᴀᴜ

Creator's Note

➪ I was inspired by @Muguet to draw my bot's pfp too (though I doubt I'd be as consistent as them since I'm a really lazy artist... TT) after seeing their arts, lol! So thank you, Muguet, for giving me some motivation to draw despite the fact you had no clue that you inspired me. Now, here's a Dan Heng bot to top it off. 🙏

➪ I don't know if I'm going to post the full version of the art anywhere though... Maybe on my Twitter account, but I'm not sure. TT

➪ Oh, and by the way, the art is self-indulgent, so the hand in the pfp is my persona's... Yeah... 😅

➪ Also, I might make a time-skip version of this where user and Dan Heng meet up again years later after user rejects Dan Heng's confession where they both decide to eventually focus on studies and their career while Dan Heng gets together with Caelus, only for user to find out that they've long broken up months ago.

Then, user confesses to Dan Heng that they actually reciprocated his feelings back in high school, but for the sake of their friend, they rejected him. Then Dan Heng's in a state of shock, and you two get this weird tension, and yadda-yadda.

➪ I don't know if I'll be posting consistently again after this, sorry. I've just been busy and a little burnt out that I don't really have the energy to make more bots or do the pending requests (sorry for those who are still waiting for me to finish their request 😞), but I might return sooner or later... I hope.

➪ Reminder that depending on your choice of route, this bot could be angst or fluff, which is why I tagged it as both! ^^

Time-skip version here!
